description: Your CISO is presenting the organization's security posture to the board next week and needs an executive-level security operations dashboard and automated high-volume attack alerting. Using Splunk (http://localhost:8000, admin/SplunkAdmin1!), create a multi-panel dashboard from security_logs that displays failed login trends over time, top attacking source IPs, and most targeted user accounts, and configure a threshold-based scheduled alert that fires when attack volumes from a single source become abnormally high.
